name: agentic-brain-core
description: Agentic Brain that orchestrates agent requests with RL-driven self-improvement

phases.name: Intent Parser
phases.description: Parse user request into handler type
acceptance: User request 'write code' maps to intent 'code'

phases.name: Capability Probe
phases.description: Check what's available: workers, inference, steering
acceptance: Returns list of healthy inference providers

phases.name: Method Router
phases.description: Route request to best available method
acceptance: With workers + inference: route to worker
With inference only: route to direct inference
With n workers: route to worker[n]
With no workers + no inference: fail fast

validation.method: Call router with different capability states

phases.name: RL Learner
phases.description: Adapt method selection based on outcomes
acceptance: Success on local model: +bonus for local
Failure on tier N: escalate to tier N+1

validation.e2e: User request 'write test' → worker executes → success returned
validation.learning: Second request uses faster model (learned from first)
